chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: The Texas Transportation Commission may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.239 — Rules

The Texas Transportation Commission may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 786, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: The Texas Transportation Commission may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 786, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.
